1056.issue: [W1056] admin 7.6.17 listed as dependency but 7.6.20 is recommended. Please consider updating globalDependency at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.zigbee/blob/master/io-package.json).

5022.issue: [S5022] Please consider migrating to admin 5 UI (jsonConfig) or react based UI.

5043.issue: [S5043] Package "vm" is a built-in Node.js module. Please use "node:vm" instead.

6019.issue: [W6019] [README.md](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.zigbee/blob/master/README.md) contains 38 changelog entries. Consider adding CHANGELOG_OLD.md file supported by @alcalzone/releasescript.

6023.issue: [W6023] Sentry plugin is configured in [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.zigbee/blob/master/io-package.json) but the required Sentry information was not found in [README.md](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.zigbee/blob/master/README.md). Please add the standard Sentry notice near the top of [README.md](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.zigbee/blob/master/README.md).

8913.issue: [S8913] No automerge workflow for dependabot PRs found. Consider setting up automerging by adding ".github/workflows/automerge-dependabot.yml".

0036.issue: [E0036] @alcalzone/release-script-plugin-manual-review 5.1.0 specified. 5.2.0 is required as minimum,  5.2.0 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.zigbee/blob/master/package.json)

0065.issue: [S0065] No devDependency for "@types/node" found. Consider adding "@types/node":">=20" to devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.zigbee/blob/master/package.json).

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. Please adapt "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '20' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '22' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.zigbee/blob/master/package.json).

0069.issue: [W0069] The following dependencies require a node.js version incompatible with the adapter's minimum (node 20): zigbee-herdsman-converters (requires node: ">=20.15.0"), zigbee-on-host (requires node: "^20.19.0 || >=22.12.0"). Please increase the engines.node requirement at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.zigbee/blob/master/package.json) or update/replace the incompatible dependencies.
